claims.detail: Monthly compute spend exceeds the submitted budget envelope; right-sizing reserved instances would reduce cost by an estimated 30%.

findings.description: Azure VM SKU selection is not cost-optimised for the stated workload profile; on-demand pricing is applied to steady-state baseline load that qualifies for reserved-instance pricing.
findings.recommendation: Purchase 1-year reserved instances for the baseline compute tier and use spot capacity for burst workloads.
